nodes.name: Fawn-breasted thrush
nodes.summary: Fawn-breasted thrush（Zoothera machiki）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Fawn-breasted thrush。

nodes.name: Fawn-breasted thrush
nodes.summary: The fawn-breasted thrush (Zoothera machiki) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is endemic to the Tanimbar Islands in Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
nodes.shortSummary: The fawn-breasted thrush (Zoothera machiki) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is endemic to the Tanimbar Islands in Indonesia.

nodes.name: Zoothera
nodes.summary: Zoothera（Zoothera）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联21种鸟类，如长尾地鸫、四川淡背地鸫、Geomalia等21种鸟类。
